svg.title: Smart Travel Agent — LangGraph Architecture
svg.desc: A flowchart showing the LangGraph state graph: START → extract_metadata → agent, which either routes to tools (looping back), to circuit_breaker, or to END.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What triggers the smart-travel-agent graph to start?')
sendPrompt('What does the extract_metadata node do in the travel agent?')
sendPrompt('How does the agent node decide between calling a tool and returning a final answer?')
g.text: LLM call · decides tool vs answer

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What tools are available in the smart-travel-agent ToolNode?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the database tools: fetch_flights, fetch_hotels, fetch_activities, get_visa_requirement')
sendPrompt('How does the web_search tool work with Tavily?')
sendPrompt('How does the circuit_breaker node work and when does it fire?')
sendPrompt('What does the END state look like in the travel agent response?')
sendPrompt('Explain the AgentState TypedDict fields in detail')
sendPrompt('How does infinite loop detection work in the travel agent?')
